## How it was tested

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` is clean and `cargo fmt` has been run
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
- [ ] Stays within Riku's scope (single binary, single box, no Docker required)
